name: Crystalline UI System
description: A comprehensive design system built on the principles of transparency and layered depth. Every component is crafted to feel like frosted glass.

name: Verdant Brand Identity
description: Complete brand identity for a sustainable architecture firm. Rooted in natural forms and brutalist typography.

name: Aureate Experience Platform
description: Full-stack experience platform for a luxury watchmaker. Features spatial audio and kinetic typography.

name: Construct Editorial
description: A 120-page editorial publication exploring the intersection of architecture and digital art.

name: Fold Motion Identity
description: Dynamic visual identity system with generative motion graphics. Every touchpoint is alive.

name: Monolith Data Dashboard
description: Enterprise data visualization dashboard with real-time analytics and spatial data mapping.
